task_completion.description: At least three dedicated folders for conversation threads have been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email client's sidebar or folder list displays at least three newly created custom folders.

task_completion.description: The first custom folder contains at least two emails from the same thread.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the contents of the first custom folder, displaying two or more emails with matching subjects or 'Re:' chains.

task_completion.description: The second custom folder contains at least two emails from the same thread.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the contents of the second custom folder, displaying two or more emails with matching subjects or 'Re:' chains.

task_completion.description: The third custom folder contains at least two emails from the same thread.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot showing the contents of the third custom folder, displaying two or more emails with matching subjects or 'Re:' chains.

task_completion.description: A draft email is addressed to 'team-leads@consultancy.org' with the subject 'Thread Organization Report'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An open email composer window showing 'team-leads@consultancy.org' in the 'To' field and 'Thread Organization Report' in the 'Subject' field.

task_completion.description: The draft email body details the organized threads and the total number of emails processed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email composer body contains text listing or summarizing the organized threads and explicitly states a number for the total emails processed.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface of the email client to create folders and move emails.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the email client's UI elements (like right-click menus, drag-and-drop, or folder creation dialogs) rather than terminal windows executing scripts.

integrity.description: The summary email is drafted within the email client's actual composition window.
integrity.visual_evidence: The draft email is visible inside the email application's native composer interface, not in a separate text editor like Notepad or a word processor.

integrity.description: The emails inside the custom folders appear to be genuine messages moved from the inbox.
integrity.visual_evidence: The emails in the new folders have standard metadata (senders, dates, subjects) consistent with an actual inbox, rather than looking like manually typed or spoofed entries.
